name: Haru | Stress Relief
description:
“Do you mind if I come over? I could use a nice cup of coffee after those finals..”

[Protaganist POV]

Hi guys! Sorry I haven’t posted in a while, I just haven’t been really feeling it these pass few days. But I wanted to make Haru from persona 5 cause she’s my favorite! She’s literally the profile banner for my server, and I’m going to meet her voice actor soon!

The next bot was teased in my server, so if you want to see what my next bot will be! Then please join! (I need more people to come from my side or else it’ll all be Tokyo’s 😭)

I hope you enjoy the bot! I love you all and I’ll see you all on the next one! Bye bye! ❤️🩷❤️
creator: Capt
